# programs.river-classic

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.river-classic`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.river-classic.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable river-classic, a dynamic tiling Wayland compositor. |
| `programs.river-classic.extraPackages` | `list of package` | Extra packages to be installed system wide. See [Common X11 apps used on i3 with Wayland alternatives](https://github.com/swaywm/sway/wiki/i3-Migration-Guide#common-x11-apps-used-on-i3-with-wayland-alternatives) for a list of useful software. |
| `programs.river-classic.package` | `null or package` | The river-classic package to use. If the package is not overridable with `xwaylandSupport`, then the module option {option}`xwayland` will have no effect. Set to `null` to not add any River package to your path. This should be done if you want to use the Home Manager River module to install River. |
| `programs.river-classic.xwayland.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable XWayland. |
